Video.summary: A Miami couple's future is at stake as differing dreams and financial conflicts test their six-year relationship.
Video.title: Benatar vs. Porciello

Video.summary: Breanna and Jonathan face a relationship crossroads, navigating trust, age gaps and uncertain futures in their complicated polyamorous love life.
Video.title: Minor vs. Sanders

Video.summary: Shocking results of a paternity test will make or break Josh and Shaneka's 10-year relationship.
Video.title: Kellam vs. Bigby

Video.summary: A once-thriving relationship teeters on the edge as accusations of infidelity and neglect come to light in court.
Video.title: Osborne vs. Osborne

Video.summary: Liatwanne petitions the court for rehab for her son, saying he's an addict who started using drugs as a teen.
Video.title: Running with the Wrong Crowd

Video.summary: Exes squabble in court over who’s to blame for their failed relationship.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Fletcher

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: John must answer for his severe smoking addiction after his girlfriend, Debbie, issues him an ultimatum.
Video.title: Goodman vs. McDonnell

Video.summary: Harmoni suspects Jarren is cheating and has demanded he take a polygraph to prove his fidelity.
Video.title: Lockhart vs Reid

Video.summary: After 10 years off and on, Darika eventually kicks Brandon out of the house; a polygraph determines whether he will be going home.
Video.title: Gist vs. Green

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating force Dawn to petition his girlfriend, Alexandra, to a polygraph to test her loyalty.
Video.title: Barnes vs. Edge

Video.summary: Antoine Grice sues landlord Nicholas Renzi for $868, claiming the apartment was unlivable and his security deposit was unfairly withheld. Renzi counters that Antoine was a troublesome tenant who overstayed.
Video.title: Lousy Landlording

Video.summary: Malika Jules claims Shamika Chambers' son broke her iPad at her salon, costing $385 to replace. Shamika denies responsibility, saying all kids were playing together, and insists there's no proof her son caused the damage.
Video.title: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Image.alt: Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad
Your Son Broke My Daughter's iPad

Video.summary: Damage to personal items, theft of a dog, and unpaid rent have exes fighting.
Video.title: Bey vs. Williams

Video.summary: After calling off their wedding, Smilez sues Dejsha for crashing his music video and breaking his $12,000 chain.
Video.title: Harrell vs. Watson

Video.summary: Keith Groubert sues his brother Jonathon for $5,000, claiming he stole a valuable Marc Chagall painting. Jonathon denies it, saying the painting is a fake and accuses Keith of stealing family jewelry.
Video.title: Stealing From a Brother

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating, a nightclub altercation and severe damage to a car find exes Timothy and Krystaly in court.
Video.title: Hariston vs. Figueroa

Video.summary: A sperm donor, suspicions of infidelity, and broken trust bring Shannon and Jasmine's rocky five-year romance to the courtroom.
Video.title: Bowman vs. Bennett

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: James, a self-proclaimed "Karma Casanova," must answer for his disrespectful behavior in his relationship with girlfriend Shana.
Video.title: Few vs. Roundtree

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: Sarah Oliver ("Bad Girls Club") weighs in on balancing work and love in Will and Jaheim's dramatic relationship.
Video.title: Thomas vs. Duval

Video.summary: Professional R&B artist Nathaniel disputes his girlfriend LeAnn's accusation of keeping their relationship a secret.
Video.title: Hall vs. Peterson

Video.summary: The results of a polygraph test will reveal if webcam star and sugar baby Andrea has been cheating on her boyfriend, Justin.
Video.title: Stephens vs. Harris

Video.summary: Sarah is suing her former friend for the bail money that she posted for him.
Video.title: Bail Bonds Break Bonds

Video.summary: Kimberly Arson claims that her cousin skipped out on rent to spend it on gambling money, cars and wigs. Charmel says the rent deal changed the day she became Kimberly's glorified nanny.
Video.title: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Image.alt: My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!
My Freeloading Cousin Is Wigging Out!

Video.summary: Jasmine and Drayson are suing each other over a security deposit due a flea infestation.
Video.title: Welcome to the Flea Circus

Video.summary: When a wife sues her own husband, the gloves come off and there are no rules...accept his. Now find out who wins when Judge Karen rules on him.
Video.title: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Image.alt: My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!
My Chauvinist Husband Lied, Cheated and Stole!

Video.summary: Bunny and Benny need Judge Lynn's advice. One wants recompense from the other due to a failed experiment.
Video.title: You're No Einstein

Video.summary: Yuri she said Bryan promised her a big bucks photobook, but when her it failed, their party petered out.
Video.title: The Party is Over

Video.summary: Kim Savage claims her brother John owes her rent and money for appliances, while John argues that he paid the rent and wants to be compensated for the emotional distress he encountered when he and his three children were tossed out on the street.
Video.title: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Image.alt: Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!
Hey Bro, You Owe! Hey Sis, You Dissed!

Video.summary: A baby mama and grandma clash over who fathered the baby boy!
Video.title: Baby Mama Drama

Video.summary: Sean Amey is suing his former roommates for his security deposit after being forced out of the apartment through calculated scheming. The roommates admit to lying but say that he deserved it.
Video.title: Rowdy Roommate Ruckus

Video.summary: While shopping for a website designer Brent met Joe but what a tangle website of woes did they weave.
Video.title: Website of Woes

Video.summary: A woman crashed her sister's car during a snowstorm, and her sister wants payment.
Video.title: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Image.alt: Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!
Hey Sis! You Trashed My Car and Trashed Our Bond!

Video.summary: Laura is suing her ex-friend and workmate for a loan. Caylee says Laura offered money without any obligations!
Video.title: The Devil's in the Details

Video.summary: Kent loaned Elizabath five grand to help pay for her dental work but is now asking for it back.
Video.title: Love Bites

Video.summary: Natash is suing her younger sister for damages from to her home from wild parties that she threw.
Video.title: House Party

Video.summary: Once beer buddies, these former friends feud over a miscommunication that led to a botched beer run and a wrecked car.
Video.title: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Image.alt: The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!
The Beer Buddy and the Crash Dummy!

Video.summary: Richard argues that Tanya tried to leave his child's birthday party early so he had every right to stop her.
Video.title: The Princess Party Disaster

Video.summary: Destiny is suing ex-roomate Bisa for unpaid rent. Bisa is counter suing for moving fees and mental anguish.
Video.title: Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: John Mahoney sues Jesse Patterson for $600 after faulty wiring at Jesse's bar allegedly fried his karaoke equipment. Jesse denies responsibility, claiming John was subcontracted by another company and the equipment malfunctioned.
Video.title: Karaoke Combustion

Video.summary: Quadaisa Nelson sues Marlow White for $1,167.87, claiming he stole the iPhone and laptop he gifted her after an argument. Marlow, who raised her since she was four, says he reclaimed the gifts due to disrespect.
Video.title: A Family Fall Out

Video.summary: A man asked his roommate to watch his puppy when he was out of town, but the puppy died in her care, so he is suing; she says she had nothing to do with the puppy's death and denies owing anything.
Video.title: Paw Prints of Deceit

Video.summary: Tylan is suing his great aunt, saying she hired him to paint her house but failed to pay.
Video.title: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Image.alt: Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together
Family’s Not Cut Out to Work Together

Video.summary: The plaintiff sues her ex-boyfriend for a cellphone and cellphone bill and says she caught him cheating; he brings to court threatening text messages she sent to him.
Video.title: Calling Collect

Video.summary: A woman sues her father, who she says was a great role model who was always there for her, for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Love vs Lease

Video.summary: Aisha claims Antwan harassed her and posted an explicit photo of her on social media without her permission.
Video.title: A Scantily Clad Suit

Video.summary: Corina broke up with Anthony after choking her but after finding out she's pregnant, sues for child support.
Video.title: Get It On Record

Video.summary: Terry is suing his ex-wife because he lent her money for their daughter (18) to have surgery on her jaw.
Video.title: A Host of Issues
